title: Aim For High Income And Less Risk With Options (November 2023)
text: We explain why selling cash-covered puts and covered calls are relatively safe choices for earning a high income. We will discuss how to formulate a sustainable and repeatable options income strategy. In this monthly series, we present how to go about selecting the right kind of stocks for options income. We present two lists of 10 stocks with multiple scenarios: Put options, call options, and deep-in-the-money call options.

title: Steel Dynamics, Inc. (STLD) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Lower Steel Prices Hurt Steel Dynamics (STLD) Earnings in Q3
text: Lower realized flat rolled steel and steel fabrication prices weigh on Steel Dynamics' (STLD) bottom line in the third quarter.

title: Compared to Estimates, Steel Dynamics (STLD) Q3 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: The headline numbers for Steel Dynamics (STLD) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended September 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.47 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.49 per share. This compares to earnings of $5.46 per share a year ago.

title: Steel Dynamics Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: FORT WAYNE, Ind., Oct. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Third Quarter 2023 Performance Highlights: Steel shipments of 3.1 million tons Net sales of $4.6 billion, operating income of $734 million, net income of $577 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $876 million Strong cash flow from operations of $1.1 billion and record liquidity of $3.7 billion Share repurchases of $331 million of the company's common stock, representing 1.8 percent of its outstanding shares Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ/GS: STLD) today announced third quarter 2023 financial results.

title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Steel Dynamics' (STLD) third-quarter results are likely to have been hurt by weaker profitability in steel operations and lower selling prices.

title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) reachead $110.49 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a +0.67% change compared to its last close.

title: Earnings Preview: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Steel Dynamics: A Strong Company At An Attractive Multiple
text: Steel Dynamics shares have performed well, rising by about 40% in the past year, despite concerns about an economic slowdown. The company's circular manufacturing model and strong utilization rate help keep costs low and maintain profitability. STLD benefits from strong secular tailwinds, including government policies supporting domestic steel prices and increased nonresidential construction activity.

title: Steel industry dented by UAW strike against Detroit's Big Three
text: Steel prices are suffering and demand is tumbling, worsened by the shutdown of auto plants owned by Ford, General Motors and Stellantis due to strike by the United Auto Workers union.
